text.title: ADR Reversibility Tagging Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the adr-reversibility-tagging methodology end-to-end.

step.name: check-preconditions
step.action: Verify every Applies-If item holds AND no Skip-If item triggers.
step.decision-gate: If preconditions fail, emit a skip-record and STOP.

step.name: estimate-rollback
step.input: Draft ADR + vendor contracts + data-migration plan.
step.decision-gate: If any field unknown, escalate to architect — do not guess.

step.name: pick-tier
step.action: Apply the 4-tier taxonomy: two_way_door (<1 day), partial_two_way (1-7 days), one_way_door_costly (>1 week), one_way_door_irrevocable (cannot undo).

step.name: draft-pre-mortem
step.action: If one_way_door_*, write 12-months-from-now pre-mortem with ≥2 failure scenarios + ≥2 reversal triggers.
step.decision-gate: If tier is one-way AND pre_mortem absent, block merge.

step.name: route-approval-gate
step.action: Route to the matching gate: solo / 1 peer / architect+PM+24h / founder+architect+48h.
step.decision-gate: If signed_at - opened_at < required cool-off hours, block merge.
